tests.name: Frontend - Test Interface Loads
tests.details: Test 1 Listening page loads with 40 questions and 4 parts

tests.name: Frontend - Question Types Render
tests.details: Note completion, multiple choice, multiple selection, matching questions all render correctly

tests.name: Frontend - Checkbox State Management
tests.details: Multiple selection checkboxes (Q14-15) work correctly, showing '2/2 selected'

tests.name: Frontend - Answer Counter
tests.details: 0/40 -> 10/40 -> 14/40 counter updates correctly as answers are filled

bugs_fixed.fix: Fixed extract_answer_keys_from_test to handle all question types including sentence_completion with items
Updated extraction logic to prioritize 'items' array for all question types

known_issues.description: User session is lost on some page transitions during automated testing
Compound questions (14-15, 27-28, 29-30) count as single entries - this is expected behavior

recommendations: Fix session persistence for reliable E2E automated testing
Run same E2E test for Test 2, 3, 4 to verify complete coverage
